description: integrations.sh is an open-source registry of integration surfaces such as APIs, GraphQL endpoints, MCP servers, and CLIs across many services. It helps developers and AI agents discover what services expose and how those integrations authenticate.
summary: integrations.sh exposes two public integration surfaces on its own domain: a REST API at `https://integrations.sh/api` and a streamable-HTTP MCP server at `https://integrations.sh/mcp`; both are documented as requiring no authentication.
